note: Community postings serving Fisher Hill. Reviewed before posting.

posts.title: Sunrise Bakery now open near Fisher Hill
posts.summary: We just opened a small family bakery a few blocks from the neighborhood — fresh sourdough, pastries, and coffee. Neighbors get 10% off the first week. Stop by and say hi!

posts.title: Walworth Avenue Block Party
posts.summary: Fisher Hill's annual block party returns — food, music, a kids' zone, and a meet-your-neighbors table. Street closed to traffic.

posts.title: Fisher Hill Spring Cleanup Walk
posts.summary: Volunteers check in and sort out at Mattison Park, then fan out to assigned blocks. Supply stations with gloves and bags will also be posted around the neighborhood — including Mitchell & Sterling Avenue and near Tibbits Avenue — so you can grab what you need close to where you're working.
